title: taraxacum obliquilobum
intro: Taraxacum obliquilobum, also known as the Oriental dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum obliquilobum include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum obliquilobum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be found in some herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
